text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 76 

HCBS_AGED_CC_IND 

LABEL: HCBS Aged State-Reported Chronic Condition Indicator — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary had the Home and community-based services (HCBS) Non-
health home Chronic Condition “Aged”; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: HCBS_AGED_CC_IND 

LONG NAME: HCBS_AGED_CC_IND 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3
